_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in identifying intelligence gaps to generate RFIs.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.483), OP-S-002 (OP, cosine: 0.460).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.486). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [gaps, generate, identifying, intelligence, rfis, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.876, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (84.6%). "Skill in identifying intelligence gaps to generate RFIs." and "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.497 ≈ STS 0.486 (gap 0.011). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [gaps, generate, identifying, intelligence, rfis, skill]. WIDAI terms: [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current].
